hero_lede: A catalogue of pulsars and fast radio bursts discovered in the FAST drift-scan survey.
survey_intro: POP is a piggyback pulsar survey conducted by the FAST science group. It searches drift-scan observations for pulsars, intermittent emitters and fast radio bursts while making the resulting catalogue useful to the wider pulsar community.
survey_footer:
The tables below list publicly released discoveries. Records are updated after scientific review; source-level FRB entries retain their individual burst detections.
PI: Lei Qian (钱磊, NAOC). 
Collaborators: Zhichen Pan (潘之辰, NAOC), YiChi Zhang (张亦弛, NAOC), Guangyuan Zhang (张光远, NAOC), Xinyu Zhang (张欣雨, NAOC), Luyao Wang (王路尧, NAOC), Ralph Eatough (瑞夫, NOAC)
